$comment: Copy to test-credentials.json and fill in real values. NEVER commit the filled file (it is gitignored).

telegram.note: Create a test bot via @BotFather. Get your user ID from @userinfobot. For end-to-end testing, the agent sends messages to the bot via https://web.telegram.org using the account that owns testUserId.

webTelegramLogin.note: Phone number for the Telegram account used to send test messages via web.telegram.org. The agent logs in, finds the bot, and sends messages to test the full message delivery pipeline.
